sys_script_fix.description:
Default OUs before 2.5 Patch 2 were not always set correctly.
How to validate the Fix Script How to test the fix script.
1. Run this query... https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_discover_office_members_list.do?sysparm_query=u_default_ouISEMPTY%5Eu_isdefaultou%3Dtrue&sysparm_view=global
This represents all OUs where an OU is set to true, but the default OU is not set.
Log the count.
2. Run the fix Script
3. Run the query again. https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_discover_office_members_list.do?sysparm_query=u_default_ouISEMPTY%5Eu_isdefaultou%3Dtrue&sysparm_view=global
You should see no more results query.
4. Run this query https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_discover_office_members_list.do?sysparm_query=u_default_ouISEMPTY&sysparm_view=global
If any OUs had no true value set, then this query will show those users. This query should show now members also as the Default OU is set for all rows.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker2.5_3_Fix_Default_OU
